declarations.name: TyuiButtonElement
declarations.summary: Native custom element button for immediate actions.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.type: default | secondary | primary | outline | subtle | transparent

attributes.name: disabled-focusable
attributes.description: Keeps the button focusable while suppressing activation.

attributes.name: icon-position
attributes.description: Places slotted icon before or after text.

events.name: click
events.description: Native composed click from the internal button.

x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Component owns internal padding and icon-label gap; parent owns width and placement.
accessibility: Use a button for actions, not navigation.
Icon-only buttons require an accessible name.
misuse: Do not place interactive controls inside the label slot.

attributes.name: type
attributes.type: text | email | password | search | tel | url | number

members.name: value
members.description: Updates internal input and form value.

events.name: input
events.description: User text input after host value updates.

x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Component owns internal padding, gap, and native input; field wrapper owns label and messages.
accessibility: Requires a visible label or accessible name.
misuse: Do not put focusable controls in content slots.
Use combobox/search components for popups or clear buttons.

x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Component owns indicator/label gap; parent owns grouping.
accessibility: Use radio for mutually exclusive choices.
misuse: Do not use checkbox as a command button.

events.name: change
events.description: Native input change reflected to host.

x-design-system.intent: Represent one option in a mutually exclusive set.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Radio owns native input and indicator; radio group owns value and roving tabindex.
accessibility: Use inside tyui-radio-group for coordinated keyboard behavior.
misuse: Do not use standalone radios for unrelated boolean choices.

declarations.name: TyuiRadioGroupElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated radio group coordinating tyui-radio children.

x-design-system.intent: Select one option from a small set.
x-design-system.pattern: ARIA radiogroup with native radio children
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Group owns child layout, value, roving tabindex, and form state.
accessibility: Arrow keys move focus and selection.
misuse: Do not put non-radio interactive controls in the default slot.

attributes.name: justify
attributes.type: start | center | end | between | around | evenly

attributes.name: gap
attributes.description: Spacing token used for row and column gap.

cssProperties.name: --ty-flex-display
cssProperties.description: Display value used by the shared layout stylesheet.

x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns child placement; children keep intrinsic sizing unless CSS changes it.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order and does not set roles.
misuse: Do not use for data grids or tabular relationships.

x-design-system.intent: Wrap small peer controls or chips across lines.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns wrapping, gaps, and alignment; children keep their own width.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order and does not set roles.
misuse: Do not use as a radio group or toolbar behavior primitive.

x-design-system.intent: Lay out peer cards or fields in responsive columns.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns track sizing and gaps; children own their internal layout.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order and does not set roles.
misuse: Do not use for semantic data tables.

x-design-system.intent: Center readable content within a measure.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns readable measure and gutter; children own internal layout.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order and does not set roles.
misuse: Do not use as a generic card or surface.

x-design-system.intent: Constrain page sections to product rails.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns section width and gutter; children own internal layout.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order and does not set roles.
misuse: Do not use bleed and full size to fake unrelated section behavior.

x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns ratio and crop behavior; media child owns rendered content.
accessibility: Preserves child semantics and alternative text.
misuse: Do not expect fit or position to affect non-replaced children.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Places the fixed side at the start or end.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Exactly two direct children: sidebar and content.

x-design-system.intent: Place a sidebar beside flexible content until wrapping is required.
x-design-system.layoutOwnership: Parent owns the two-child relationship, side sizing, wrapping, and gap.
accessibility: Preserves DOM order; side=end changes visual order with row-reverse only.
misuse: Do not use with more or fewer than two direct children.
